channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: dbc9c667-e97f-4491-aee6-90b9cf960190
Display name: Privileged Monitoring Data Reader
Description: Privileged Monitoring Data Reader can query and search the logs it is allowed to view over Log Analytics workspaces and tables, including protected tables
Link: https://management.azure.com/dbc9c667-e97f-4491-aee6-90b9cf960190?api-version=2022-04-01
